Interface IZCollection

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to operations on Z-aware geometries.

[Guid("EFEEB8B4-DC23-11D2-9F2E-00C04F6BDF0D")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IZCollection

Properties

ZMax

The maximum Z value.

double ZMax { get; }

Property Value

double

Sample Snippet

ZMin

The minimum Z value.

double ZMin { get; }

double

MultiplyZs(double)

Multiplies all the Z values by a factor.

OffsetZs(double)

Offsets all the Z values by an offset value.
